channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | US-India Relations: Can Marco Rubio Fix It?
item.description: Marco Rubio, the secretary of state and national security advisor, has arrived in India on his first visit as "Mr Fix It".
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio, the secretary of state and national security advisor, has arrived in India on his first visit as "Mr Fix It".

item.title: Video: Donald Trump Tosses Stephen Colbert In Dumpster Before YMCA Dance In AI-Generated Clip

media:content.media:description: Trump posted a video showing him tossing Colbert in a dumpster following "The Late Show" finale.

item.description: US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated video mocking Stephen Colbert after "The Late Show" ended.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated video mocking Stephen Colbert after "The Late Show" ended.

item.title: Quad, Oil, Defence: Why Marco Rubio's India Visit Carries High Stakes

media:content.media:description: Rubio's four-day visit is expected to cover nearly every major pillar of the India-US relationship

item.description: India continues to purchase large volumes of discounted Russian oil, but the US is looking to expand its footprint in India's energy market through LNG and crude exports.
item.content:encoded: India continues to purchase large volumes of discounted Russian oil, but the US is looking to expand its footprint in India's energy market through LNG and crude exports.

item.title: Inside Maldives "Death Cave": Chilling New Photos From Site Of Six-Diver Tragedy

media:content.media:description: Five Italian divers disappeared while exploring a complex cave system near Vaavu Atoll.

item.description: Investigators believe the group became trapped after venturing too deep into the unmapped cave network, where poor visibility and narrow passages complicated rescue operations.
item.content:encoded: Investigators believe the group became trapped after venturing too deep into the unmapped cave network, where poor visibility and narrow passages complicated rescue operations.

item.title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: Top Trump Aide Lands In Kolkata For 4-Day India Visit

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio India visit: This is Marco Rubio's first trip to India since taking office

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: US Considering New Strikes On Iran Amid Ongoing Negotiations: Report

media:content.media:description: The White House did not comment on the reports

item.description: Negotiations are said to be ongoing, with Pakistan -- which is mediating between the US and Iran -- sending its military chief to Tehran in an attempt to seal a deal.
item.content:encoded: Negotiations are said to be ongoing, with Pakistan -- which is mediating between the US and Iran -- sending its military chief to Tehran in an attempt to seal a deal.

item.title: Trump To Miss Son's Wedding Due To Iran War, Says "Love For US Doesn't Allow Me"

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump and Donald Trump Jr. in Washington DC (File)

item.description: Trump had said a day earlier that the Iran war made it "bad timing" for him to attend Donald Trump Jr's wedding to Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas this weekend.
item.content:encoded: Trump had said a day earlier that the Iran war made it "bad timing" for him to attend Donald Trump Jr's wedding to Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas this weekend.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Mulls New Iran Strikes, No Final Call Yet: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: Work-From-Home Refusal Can Trigger Lawsuits, Rules UK Tribunal In Anxiety Case

media:content.media:description: Legal experts say this decision sends a clear message to UK employers.

item.description: The tribunal found the council failed to make reasonable adjustments for her mental health condition, setting a significant legal precedent for remote-working rights.
item.content:encoded: The tribunal found the council failed to make reasonable adjustments for her mental health condition, setting a significant legal precedent for remote-working rights.

item.title: H-1B Visa Applications Drop 38%. Trump Administration Says Days Of Abuse Over

media:content.media:description: The immigration agency also said the profile of selected applicants appeared to be changing

item.description: Data released by the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) showed that properly submitted H-1B registrations fell by 38.5 per cent compared to last year, from 343,981 in fiscal year 2026 to 211,600 for fiscal year 2027.
item.content:encoded: Data released by the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) showed that properly submitted H-1B registrations fell by 38.5 per cent compared to last year, from 343,981 in fiscal year 2026 to 211,600 for fiscal year 2027.

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard Quits As US Intelligence Chief To Support Ill Husband

media:content.media:description: Tulsi Gabbard shared her resignation letter in a post on X.

item.description: Tulsi Gabbard Resigns As US Intelligence Chief To Support Husband's Cancer Battle
item.content:encoded: Tulsi Gabbard Resigns As US Intelligence Chief To Support Husband's Cancer Battle

item.title: Want To Apply For Green Card? Return Home First: New US Immigration Rules

media:content.media:description: The policy affects anyone in the US on a temporary, non-immigrant visa planning to apply for Green Card

item.description: The new policy, issued by US Citizenship and Immigration Services, reclassifies 'Adjustment of Status' as an "extraordinary form of relief", meaning it will only be approved in limited, exceptional cases.
item.content:encoded: The new policy, issued by US Citizenship and Immigration Services, reclassifies 'Adjustment of Status' as an "extraordinary form of relief", meaning it will only be approved in limited, exceptional cases.

item.title: Trump's Team Wanted To Ban Voting Machines In Half Of US Last Year: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump officials sought a traditional paper voting system.

item.description: White House adviser Kurt Olsen, a lawyer Trump has tasked with proving widely debunked election-rigging conspiracy theories, pushed the plan to target Dominion Voting Systems machines.
item.content:encoded: White House adviser Kurt Olsen, a lawyer Trump has tasked with proving widely debunked election-rigging conspiracy theories, pushed the plan to target Dominion Voting Systems machines.

item.title: Thailand Man Sets World Record After Landing On World's Highest Active Volcano

media:content.media:description: Tanaboworn said that the view was incredibly beautiful.

item.description: Tanaboworn also said that while attempting the record, he wanted people around the world to recognise Thailand and feel proud of the country.
item.content:encoded: Tanaboworn also said that while attempting the record, he wanted people around the world to recognise Thailand and feel proud of the country.

item.title: EU To Impose Sanctions On Iranian Officials For Hormuz Strait Blockade

media:content.media:description: The Iran war and the closure of Hormuz have sent ripples across the global economy.

item.description: Deeming the blockade "contrary to international law", EU governments took a technical step to extend the scope of its existing Iran sanctions regime allowing for more individuals to be targeted under it.
item.content:encoded: Deeming the blockade "contrary to international law", EU governments took a technical step to extend the scope of its existing Iran sanctions regime allowing for more individuals to be targeted under it.

item.title: Italy, France, UK, Germany Urge Israel To End West Bank Settlement Expansion

media:content.media:description: The countries condemned Israel's E1 settlement plan.

item.description: Noting that the situation in the West Bank had "deteriorated significantly" in the past few months, the countries said settler violence towards Palestinians was at "unprecedented levels".
item.content:encoded: Noting that the situation in the West Bank had "deteriorated significantly" in the past few months, the countries said settler violence towards Palestinians was at "unprecedented levels".

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party Crosses Border, Pakistan Now 'Infested'

media:content.media:description: There are many versions of the Cockroach Janta Party in Pakistan

item.description: There are many versions of the Cockroach Janta Party in Pakistan, such as Cockroach Awami Party, Cockroach Awami League and Muttahida Cockroach Movement. The bio of the Cockroach Awami Party reads, "A political front of the youth, by the youth, for P
item.content:encoded: There are many versions of the Cockroach Janta Party in Pakistan, such as Cockroach Awami Party, Cockroach Awami League and Muttahida Cockroach Movement. The bio of the Cockroach Awami Party reads, "A political front of the youth, by the youth, for P

item.title: WHO Africa Head Says Underestimating Ebola Spread Risk Can Be "Big Mistake"

media:content.media:description: A new strain of Ebola is spreading in some African countries.

item.description: WHO regional director for Africa Mohamed Yakub Janabi said just one case of Ebola could spread the virus beyond the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.
item.content:encoded: WHO regional director for Africa Mohamed Yakub Janabi said just one case of Ebola could spread the virus beyond the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.

item.title: Strait Of Hormuz Shutdown, Oil Supply Crisis Triggers 'Red Zone' Warning
item.description: The IEA has already issued warnings about 'the most severe disruption' ever; in April agency chief Fatih Birol told CNBC: "We are facing the biggest energy security threat in history."
item.content:encoded: The IEA has already issued warnings about 'the most severe disruption' ever; in April agency chief Fatih Birol told CNBC: "We are facing the biggest energy security threat in history."

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | India's Oil Reserves: How Long Can They Last As Iran War Continues?
item.description: From a future energy security perspective, India will have to significantly enhance its SPR capacities from 17 days to a minimum of 45 days on land, with the possibility of another 10-15 days of SPR on sea on tankers.
item.content:encoded: From a future energy security perspective, India will have to significantly enhance its SPR capacities from 17 days to a minimum of 45 days on land, with the possibility of another 10-15 days of SPR on sea on tankers.
